author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Performance summary after this session: 0.93s/tok (previous was 1.2s/tok). Improvements: cached cuBLAS handle eliminates per-op handle creation. Remaining bottlenecks identified via nsys: (1) cuBLAS JIT compilation for unique matrix shapes (54% of GPU API time), (2) GPU↔CPU memcpy (25%), (3) cudaMalloc/Free per operation. The small matmul PTX kernel had a bug and was disabled. Next steps to reach target: fix the small matmul kernel (verify with ptxas), implement flash attention, pre-compute all position embeddings, implement GPU memory pool.
